summary: MPI for Lua provides bindings for the Message Passing Interface (MPI). LuaJIT is a just-in-time compiler for the Lua language that provides native C data structures through its foreign function interface (FFI) library. MPI for Lua supports MPI-2.1, MPI-2.2 and MPI-3.0 using Open MPI or MPICH and LuaJIT.
raw_content: MPI for Lua provides bindings for the Message Passing Interface (MPI). LuaJIT is a just-in-time compiler for the Lua language that provides native C data structures through its foreign function interface (FFI) library. MPI for Lua supports MPI-2.1, MPI-2.2 and MPI-3.0 using Open MPI or MPICH and LuaJIT.
generated_summary: mpi is a library for providing bindings for the Message Passing Interface (MPI) complete usually used in the fields of mpi.
phase1: A Lua library for MPI bindings with support for MPI-2.1, MPI-2.2, and MPI-3.0 using Open MPI or MPICH and LuaJIT.
phase2: Provides bindings for the Message Passing Interface (MPI) with LuaJIT, a Just-In-Time compiler for Lua.
phase3: Supports MPI-2.1, MPI-2.2, and MPI-3.0 using Open MPI or MPICH, and LuaJIT for efficient message passing and parallel computing.
